headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 20, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants fell short in their 0-3 loss to the Washington Nationals, as Curtis Mead led the Giants' offense with a home run and two RBIs. In other action, the Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Joey Loperfido of the Houston Astros, who was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a right quad strain. Other injured players include James McArthur of the Kansas City Royals, Jhoan Duran of the Philadelphia Phillies, Prelander Berroa of the Chicago White Sox, Cade Horton of the Chicago Cubs, Jorge Polanco of the New York Mets, Patrick Wisdom of the Seattle Mariners, and Zach McKinstry of the Detroit Tigers.

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade with the New York Yankees. The Los Angeles Dodgers also made a trade, acquiring right-hander Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles. Additionally, the New York Mets traded left-hander Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, while the Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-hander Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Nation's Capital**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 0-3 loss to the Washington Nationals, unable to overcome the strong pitching performance. Curtis Mead led the Giants' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall to Yankees in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees took control of the game early, ultimately defeating the Kansas City Royals 7-0. Ryan Weathers led the way for the Yankees, pitching 7.1 innings with 8 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Fall to Guardians in 8-4 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles suffered a tough defeat on the road, losing 8-4 to the Cleveland Guardians. José Ramírez led the Guardians' offense with two home runs and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Place Joey Loperfido on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Joey Loperfido on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a right quad strain.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt from the New York Yankees.
